summary: Per-provider auto-sync feature verified. Backend API correctly returns auto_sync_providers (array) and connected_providers (array). Frontend shows TWO separate toggle switches for Google Calendar and Outlook in the Auto-sync section. Apple Calendar and Auto-sync sections are now inside the Calendriers section. Teams UX fix from previous iteration still works (Clara=green/advanced, Sandrine=grey/standard).

backend_api_tests: Legacy format PUT with {auto_sync_enabled: true} enables all connected providers
Legacy format PUT with {auto_sync_enabled: false} disables all
GET reflects changes made by PUT
Invalid provider is filtered out from auto_sync_providers
frontend_ui_tests: Clara: Apple Calendar section (data-testid='apple-calendar-section') is inside Calendriers section
Clara: Auto-sync section (data-testid='auto-sync-section') is inside Calendriers section
Clara: TWO separate toggle switches visible (Google Calendar and Outlook)
Clara: Google toggle (data-testid='auto-sync-google-toggle') works - ON=violet, OFF=grey
Clara: Outlook toggle (data-testid='auto-sync-outlook-toggle') works - ON=violet, OFF=grey
Clara: Toggle Google OFF shows 'Auto-sync actif vers Outlook' text
Clara: Toggle Google ON shows 'Auto-sync actif vers Outlook et Google Calendar' text
Clara: Teams calendar note is GREEN (advanced user)
Clara: Teams advanced active banner visible
Sandrine: Teams calendar note is GREY (standard user)
Sandrine: Teams upgrade banner visible (correct for standard user)
Sandrine: Teams advanced banner NOT visible (correct for standard user)

test_credentials.advanced_user: clara.deschamps@demo-nlyt.fr / Demo2026! (has Google + Outlook connected, teams.level='advanced')
test_credentials.standard_user: sandrine.bonnet@demo-nlyt.fr / Demo2026! (has Google + Outlook connected, teams.level='standard')

context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-provider auto-sync feature implemented. Key implementation details: (1) Backend calendar_routes.py lines 424-510 - GET/PUT /auto-sync/settings now supports auto_sync_providers array. (2) Frontend Integrations.js - Auto-sync section with per-provider toggles using data-testid='auto-sync-google-toggle' and 'auto-sync-outlook-toggle'. (3) Apple Calendar section (data-testid='apple-calendar-section') and Auto-sync section (data-testid='auto-sync-section') are now children of the Calendriers section. (4) Teams UX fix verified - Clara (advanced) sees green Teams note, Sandrine (standard) sees grey Teams note.
screenshots: .screenshots/clara_integrations_full.png - Shows full integrations page for Clara
.screenshots/clara_integrations_scrolled.png - Shows Auto-sync section with both toggles ON
.screenshots/clara_google_toggle_off.png - Shows Google toggle OFF, Outlook ON
.screenshots/sandrine_integrations.png - Shows Teams note grey for standard user
